name: cse340-webbackenddevelopment
description: Project is centered on Server-Side Fundamentals and web development  My setup checklist includes Node.js, npm, Git, and my editor (VS Code or WebStorm). I also need Microsoft Teams for group communication. I’ll make sure I can open a terminal inside my editor and know exactly where my project folder lives. My .gitignore must include node_modules/ and .env so I don’t accidentally push sensitive or unnecessary files to GitHub.
